name: competitor-analysis
description: Produce a structured SWOT-based competitor analysis from a company name, identifying positioning gaps and strategic opportunities.
input_description: Competitor company name, their industry/niche, your own company context (optional), and any specific areas of concern (pricing, product, marketing, etc.).
output_description: Full competitor analysis with company overview, SWOT matrix (Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, Threats), positioning map, marketing tactics assessment, and 3-5 actionable strategic recommendations.
